english: Good morning! What are you looking for today?
choicesEnglish: Good morning! What are you looking for today?
correctAnswerEnglish: Good morning! What are you looking for today?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Il saluto tipico del venditore al mercato.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è la domanda classica per iniziare l'assistenza al cliente.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! The typical vendor's greeting at the market.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's the classic question to start customer assistance.

english: I'm looking for some ripe tomatoes.
correctAnswerEnglish: I'm looking for some ripe tomatoes.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Esprimere chiaramente cosa desideri comprare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, stai cercando verdura pronta da mangiare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Clearly expressing what you want to buy.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you are looking for vegetables ready to eat.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Specificare la consistenza desiderata della verdura.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indichi che non vuoi prodotti troppo cedevoli al tatto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Specifying the desired vegetable texture.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you indicate that you don't want products that are too yielding to the touch.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Quando il grado di maturazione è ideale.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica una condizione ottimale del frutto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! When the degree of ripening is ideal.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates an optimal fruit condition.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Una garanzia di freschezza del produttore.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, il venditore assicura che il prodotto è del giorno prima.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! A producer's guarantee of freshness.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the vendor assures that the product is from the day before.

feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Asking for products typical of the current period.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you are looking for fruits that ripen in this month.

choicesEnglish: Where does he run to me?

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you want a suggestion on what to buy.

choicesEnglish: The bags were very dirty yesterday.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Un complimento del venditore alla qualità del prodotto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica che le fragole sono di ottima qualità.

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates that the strawberries are of excellent quality.

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you are ordering a small box of strawberries.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Specificare la quantità desiderata in grammi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, stai chiedendo una porzione di duecento grammi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Specifying the desired quantity in grams.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you are asking for a two-hundred-gram portion.

choicesEnglish: Lose some dirty bag for me.

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you are ordering freshly made white cheese.
